fixtureDescription: Mixed Korean-English Konglish text with English loanwords
passage: 오늘 English class에서 presentation을 했는데 정말 nervous했어요. Teacher가 feedback을 주셨는데, pronunciation은 좋지만 vocabulary가 부족하다고 하셨어요. 그래서 오늘부터 매일 reading practice를 하려고 해요. 특히 academic words를 많이 외워야 할 것 같아요. Study group 친구들이랑 같이 하면 더 재미있을 것 같아요.

items.levelRationale: A formal talk or display of information to an audience, commonly used in academic and professional contexts.
items.importanceRationale: Essential for understanding the main activity and context of the passage.

items.levelRationale: Feeling anxious or worried about something.
items.importanceRationale: Critical to understanding the speaker's emotional state during the presentation.

items.levelRationale: Comments or information given about performance or work to help improvement.
items.importanceRationale: Central to the passage as it drives the speaker's decision to study more.

items.levelRationale: The way words are spoken or articulated in a language.
items.importanceRationale: Important for understanding the teacher's evaluation and the speaker's strengths.

items.levelRationale: The set of words known or used by a person in a language.
items.importanceRationale: Essential as it identifies the area needing improvement and motivates the study plan.

items.levelRationale: Specialized vocabulary used in scholarly and educational contexts.
items.importanceRationale: Helpful for understanding what specific type of vocabulary the speaker plans to learn.

items.levelRationale: Repeated exercises in reading to improve comprehension and skills.
items.importanceRationale: Important for understanding the speaker's chosen study method.

items.levelRationale: A group of students who meet together to learn and study collaboratively.
items.importanceRationale: Relevant to understanding the speaker's plan to make studying more enjoyable.
